arts.ttl: Newcastle v Everton, Fulham v Manchester City, and more: Premier League final day – live
arts.sum: Premier League season final day, kick-offs at 4pm BST Live scores | Premier League table | Golden Boot race This is the end, beautiful friends. Another Premier League season has whooshed by faster than you can say “You know what, I’m not sure Liverpool are going to have a blip”, and it will come to an end this afternoon – as a Premier League season always should – with 10 simultaneous fixtures being played on a sultry Sunday in May. The first game of the 2024-25 season took place 282 days ago. In one sense it feels like last month, in another a lifetime ago: that match was Manchester United 1-0 Fulham, and cautious optimism abounded at Old Trafford. Bournemouth v Leicester Fulham v Man City Ipswich v West Ham Liverpool v Crystal Palace Man Utd v Aston Villa Newcastle v Everton Nottm Forest v Chelsea Southampton v Arsenal Lads, it’s Tottenham v Brighton Wolves v Brentford Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Fulham this afternoon for their final match of the Premier League season. Despite beating Bournemouth on Tuesday night, City’s place in the Champions League next season is not guaranteed. If they lose at Craven Cottage and Newcastle, Chelsea and Aston Villa all win, they will drop into the Europa League places. […] The post Fulham vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Manchester City XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City head to Fulham on the final weekend of the Premier League season seeking to secure their place in the Champions League. A point will be enough for Pep Guardiola’s side given their superior goal difference on sixth-placed Aston Villa. However, defeat at Craven Cottage could see the Citizens miss out if Newcastle, Chelsea […] The post Manchester City XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Premier League reaches final day and more playoff drama awaits – matchday live
arts.sum: Arsenal’s WCL glory | Sunderland up | Dons win Cup Live scores | Fixtures | Tables | And get in touch It’s 20 years since Istanbul: just say the word and everyone knows what you’re talking about. Sachin Nakrani was there, fresh-faced and rocking a top with ‘LFC 4 LIFE’ on the back. Love it. Right, let’s hear your views on this Premier League season. I’d like the following: the verdict on your side’s campaign, your favourite moment, and predictions for next season (winner, relegated sides, best player). Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Man City Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Fulham, sitting mid-table, host Man City, who are battling for a Champions League spot, in the Premier League at Craven Cottage. The match is scheduled for May 25th, 2025, with a 16:00 GMT kick-off. ...

arts.ttl: Fulham vs. Man City: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Man City visit Fulham in their final Premier League game of the season. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, score prediction and more.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish 'dropped from Man City's squad for Fulham clash ahead of talks over his future' - after he was the last to leave Kevin De Bruyne's farewell party
arts.sum: Grealish, who joined the club in a sensational £100million move from Aston Villa in 2021, has seen his season brought to a premature end.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish: 'Almost guaranteed' transfer update emerges as Man City attacker 'will miss' Fulham clash
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is reportedly left out of Man City's matchday squad for Sunday's Premier League trip to Fulham amidst uncertainty over his future.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Fulham is Manchester City’s biggest game of season by far
arts.sum: City head to Fulham knowing a draw will almost certainly secure a top-five spot and a place in the Champions League for next season.
